attributes.description: Everything under C:\Users\<user>\... EXCEPT the noisy Microsoft/AppData/SystemData paths. Focused on the directories where users actually keep things: Desktop, Documents, Pictures, Videos, plus any new top-level folder a user created in their profile. Filter further by user (user.name) when investigating one actor.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"filter":[],"highlightAll":true,"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index","query":{"language":"kuery","query":"file.path : *\\\\Users\\\\* and not file.path : *\\\\AppData\\\\* and not file.path : *\\\\Microsoft\\\\* and not file.path : *NTUSER* and not file.path : *UsrClass*"},"version":true}

attributes.title: Filesystem: User Profile (Desktop/Documents/Pictures — non-AppData)
